persona.scenario: Senior backend and applied AI engineer laid off after a platform reorganization; targeting staff-level AI infrastructure and backend platform roles.
persona.privacy_posture: Local Ollama by default. External AI, sensitive memory, and visa processing consent are all disabled at seed time.
persona.headline: Senior Backend and AI Platform Engineer
persona.summary: Built production RAG services, internal developer platforms, and retrieval evaluation workflows. Looking for staff-level AI infrastructure roles with clear human review boundaries.

journey.user_goal: Convert a stressful layoff into a private operating plan.
journey.product_moment: Maya signs in, confirms local-first defaults, and sees that external AI and auto-actions are disabled.

journey.user_goal: Understand burn rate and choose a sustainable weekly search pace.
journey.product_moment: Runway snapshots show planning guidance and risk signals without legal, tax, financial, or benefits advice.

journey.user_goal: Ground resume versions in user-provided facts.
journey.product_moment: The original resume is preserved, parsed, chunked, and versioned with source inputs.

journey.user_goal: Compare a job description against current evidence before applying.
journey.product_moment: JD match returns fit signals, missing evidence, and citation requirements through the AI Gateway.

journey.user_goal: Track roles, stages, follow-ups, sponsorship signals, and linked resume versions.
journey.product_moment: Every application row is user-owned and deterministic; no application is submitted by the system.

journey.user_goal: Build reusable STAR stories and portfolio assets from cited evidence.
journey.product_moment: Proof assets stay draft, ready, or approved and show citations before use.

journey.user_goal: Practice the loops that matter for active opportunities.
journey.product_moment: Interview sessions track focus areas, scores, and feedback without claiming hiring outcomes.

journey.user_goal: Coordinate search activity without losing human control.
journey.product_moment: CareerCampaignAgent orchestrates typed tools, runs ComplianceGuard, and creates approval requests instead of auto-sending.

journey.user_goal: Switch local Ollama models and verify consent boundaries.
journey.product_moment: Remote model base URLs are rejected; external consent remains separate and off by default.

journey.user_goal: Use readiness, follow-ups, and offer-stage evidence to make a human decision.
journey.product_moment: ReboundIQ provides planning guidance and risk signals only, with reminders to seek qualified professional advice for employment, immigration, tax, or financial decisions.

runway_snapshots.title: Base recovery plan

assumptions_json.professional_advice_note: Planning guidance only; verify benefits, taxes, immigration, and offer terms with qualified professionals.

action_items_json: Freeze nonessential spend until two late-stage loops are active.
Schedule two warm intro blocks each week.
Review benefits, immigration, tax, and financial questions with qualified professionals.

resume.parsed_text: Maya Patel - Senior Backend and AI Platform Engineer. Built local-first RAG evaluation services, FastAPI APIs, Postgres/pgvector retrieval stores, and Next.js operational consoles. Led incident review and mentored engineers. All details are synthetic for the ReboundIQ demo.

parsed_json.name: Maya Patel
evidence_notes: RAG evaluation harness for internal support workflows
FastAPI service migration with auditable request logs

chunks.text: Built production RAG services with local-first provider defaults, redaction gates, and evaluation coverage.
Led backend platform reliability work across FastAPI, Postgres, Docker, and typed service boundaries.

content_json.summary: Staff-level backend engineer specializing in local-first AI systems, retrieval evaluation, and safe developer platforms.
bullets: Built a synthetic RAG evaluation suite with groundedness, redaction, schema, and safety checks.
Migrated internal APIs to typed FastAPI services with user-scoped audit trails.
Partnered with product and design to turn AI governance constraints into visible workflow states.

source_inputs.missing_metrics_note: Do not invent latency, cost, hiring, or revenue metrics.

applications.next_step: Prepare system design interview evidence packet

applications.jd_snapshot: Own workflow APIs, agent approvals, audit logging, and regulated data boundaries.
applications.notes: Good backend and governance match. Ask recruiter about on-call and data handling.

applications.notes: Saved for later. Needs more proof around search relevance and roadmap leadership.

proof_assets.summary: A concise story about turning vague AI quality concerns into measurable, reviewable evaluation gates.

question_log_json.answer_note: Use local-first provider defaults, goldens, citations, redaction, and audit logs.

campaign.goal: Land a staff-level AI platform or senior backend role in 90 days using only user-approved artifacts.

metadata_json.cadence: 3 high-fit applications per week, 2 warm intros, 2 interview practice blocks

approval_requests.notes: Human approval required before this plan is treated as accepted.

artifact_json.draft: Draft only. User must review citations and send manually.

approval_requests.notes: No auto-send. ComplianceGuard must pass before use.

consent_records.consent_text: External AI disabled for demo. Local Ollama is the default path.
Sensitive memory disabled until the user explicitly opts in.

outcome_kpis.name: Time to first credible plan
outcome_kpis.why_it_matters: Turns layoff shock into a concrete weekly operating loop.

outcome_kpis.name: Evidence coverage
outcome_kpis.demo_value: 2 ready or draft proof assets linked to active applications
outcome_kpis.why_it_matters: Moves beyond generic resumes into cited artifacts.

outcome_kpis.name: Pipeline health
outcome_kpis.demo_value: 3 active opportunities across saved, recruiter, and technical stages
outcome_kpis.why_it_matters: Shows whether the search has enough stage diversity.

outcome_kpis.name: Human control
outcome_kpis.why_it_matters: Keeps the product safe and enterprise-trustworthy.

outcome_kpis.name: Privacy posture
outcome_kpis.demo_value: 100% local AI in seed data, 0 external AI calls
outcome_kpis.why_it_matters: Makes privacy a measurable product promise.

outcome_kpis.name: Interview readiness
outcome_kpis.why_it_matters: Connects job targeting to the next coaching loop without guaranteeing outcomes.

competitive_differentiation.difference: ReboundIQ combines runway, evidence, applications, interviews, agent approvals, and privacy controls instead of stopping at status columns.
Resume versions are tied to source inputs, JD signals, proof assets, and citations so the product can mark missing evidence instead of fabricating claims.
Local Ollama is the default. External AI requires explicit consent, redaction, and audit logging.
Agents orchestrate and request approval; they do not auto-apply, auto-send, or silently edit artifacts.

legal_disclaimer: ReboundIQ provides planning guidance and risk signals only. It is not legal, immigration, tax, financial, medical, hiring, or employment advice. Users should review all artifacts and consult qualified professionals for employment agreements, immigration status, tax obligations, financial decisions, benefits, and offer terms.
